title: Buttery Dense Thai Haddock Stir-fry
description: A monsoon-inspired dish featuring crispy haddock in a rich and buttery sauce, made with fresh herbs and spices for an authentic Thai taste.
instructions: Whisk together soy sauce, garlic, fish sauce, and lime juice in a bowl.
Coat haddock fillets with flour before marinating them for at least 20 minutes.
Season both sides of the coated fillets with red curry paste. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 15-20 minutes or until fish is cooked through and golden brown.
While fish bakes, prepare the sauce by heating remaining sauce ingredients in a small pot over medium heat until slightly thickened.
Drain and serve haddock fillets hot with sauce spooned over them. Garnish with cilantro.
Optional: Serve with steamed jasmine rice for complete meal.
